---
title: "About"
toc: false
---

## Hi, I'm David.

I'm a data scientist working in pharmaceutical manufacturing, where I focus
on process analytics and data science. My day-to-day involves turning complex
manufacturing data into clear, actionable insights — often with R, ggplot2,
and Shiny.

I care about making data visualizations that are not just accurate but genuinely
useful and interesting to look at. I'm a regular participant in
[TidyTuesday](https://github.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday) and enjoy the
challenge of finding stories in unfamiliar datasets.

### What I'm learning

I'm currently expanding into:

- **D3.js** for interactive, web-native data visualization
- **Bayesian statistics & causal inference** via Richard McElreath's
  *Statistical Rethinking*
- **Data strategy and governance** through a course at Imperial College
  and Simplilearn

### Tools I work with

**Primary:** R (tidyverse, ggplot2, Shiny) · Git · Quarto

**Growing:** Python (pandas, numpy) · D3.js · JavaScript · SQL

**Domain:** GxP environments · process analytics · statistical process control ·
equivalence testing · mixed models

### Get in touch

- [GitHub](https://github.com/damense)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/dmendezsev/)
- Email: d.mendsev@gmail.com
